dsl_rule.translation_notes: Interpreted 'higher low' as low > prev_low. Entry price of 9,614 used as approximate entry level with close >= 9614. Stop loss at 9,600 implies ~0.15% below entry (14 pips / 9,614). Multiple MA support focused on sma_200 (200MA line explicitly mentioned). Exit when price closes below 200MA, indicating loss of support. Target regime set to RANGING as specified.

backtest_rule.reason: Interpreted 'higher low' as low > prev_low. Entry price of 9,614 used as approximate entry level with close >= 9614. Stop loss at 9,600 implies ~0.15% below entry (14 pips / 9,614). Multiple MA support focused on sma_200 (200MA line explicitly mentioned). Exit when price closes below 200MA, indicating loss of support. Target regime set to RANGING as specified.

source_rule_text: Enter a long trade around a higher low level with stop loss placed below the recent swing low, when multiple moving average lines provide support.
